summary:
TIMELINE AND PROPHETIC ACCELERATION: Brandon states that the world is entering an unprecedented period of acceleration regarding wars and geopolitical shaking, specifically pointing to the latter half of 2026 and into 2027. Brandon outlines that this timeframe will feature severe global shifts, widespread manifestations of signs and wonders, and a targeted shaking designed to awaken a slumbering world.

MARTYRS AND DOMESTIC TERRORISM: Brandon recounts a vision of preachers being assassinated by snipers while delivering sermons on stages, indicating a coming wave of martyrs within the Christian faith. Furthermore, Brandon describes a catastrophic explosion involving a nuclear-like device inside a major building in the northeastern United States. Brandon notes that this event will generate newspaper headlines reading 'Terror strikes again,' 'Terror in the heartland,' and 'Nation in Turmoil.'

CUBA REVIVAL AND POLITICAL SHIFTS: Brandon predicts a significant spiritual revival and liberation movement coming to Cuba, which will deeply impact Latino and Asian communities. Brandon details that Marco Rubio will be instrumental in these events, referencing recent comments by Donald Trump regarding military posturing and offshore aircraft carriers to pressure the Cuban government into surrendering.

UKRAINE AND EUROPEAN CONFLICT: Brandon shares a vision concerning Ukrainian President Zelensky, depicting him engaging in illicit activities before either fleeing the country with large sums of money or being eliminated, paving the way for a proxy government. Brandon also describes symbolic visions involving Emmanuel Macron, an injured dove, a cardinal, and a turtle, explaining that France will supply missiles to Ukraine to provoke Russia and instigate World War III. Brandon states that European leaders will attempt to ensnare the United States in NATO as Donald Trump tries to withdraw troops from Germany.

DOMESTIC POLITICS AND THREATS AGAINST TRUMP: Brandon warns of an impending coup against Donald Trump utilizing the 25th Amendment, orchestrated by an Ivy League-educated individual described as a chameleon. Brandon urges vigilance regarding Trump's physical safety, specifically concerning his heart and blood flow, and warns of another event similar to January 6th engineered by deep state actors. Brandon also mentions that Byron Donalds is destined to become the next governor of Florida, while Ron DeSantis will move into Trump's cabinet.

GLOBAL WARFARE AND DEVASTATING WEAPONS: Brandon recalls a vision of a hijacked black, red, and white oil tanker used to deploy a dirty device. Additionally, Brandon warns that Poland will provoke Vladimir Putin, resulting in Russia deploying a novel, non-nuclear weapon near Warsaw that melts human flesh without destroying infrastructure. Brandon foresees North Korea joining the conflict and China turning its back on Russia to focus aggressively on Taiwan.

PANDEMIC AND INFRASTRUCTURE CRISES: Brandon differentiates a currently reported ship-bound virus from a future, rat-borne plague originating in Europe that will cause severe sores and kill over 350 million people, an event Brandon attributes to Chinese actions. On a domestic level, Brandon predicts massive cyber attacks targeting the United States electric grid, water systems, and natural gas facilities, causing weeks-long blackouts. Brandon foresees a return to 1970s-style gas shortages with mile-long lines, exacerbated by geopolitical issues involving Israel.

MEDIA FIGURES AND SPECIFIC HEALINGS: Brandon predicts an assassination attempt on Alex Jones involving a crossbow in a parking lot and describes Tucker Carlson's heart turning black. Brandon also calls out specific physical and mental healings, including a person suffering from restricted blood flow in the left side of their neck causing dizziness, and an unnamed celebrity battling severe sleep anxiety and depression driven by high cortisol and adrenal fatigue.
rawData: [May 04, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/Zp04KcZ0DnU]-[Well, good evening family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining us again tonight on this Sunday. What a wonderful day it's been. You know, the weather's been really pretty in the state of Oklahoma. We're believing for more rain. We need a lot more rain. I don't know where you are, but I bet you need rain, too. And so, we're going to continue to pray for the rain over this nation. I know there's a lot of people that are in drought. And so, before we get into the summer, we only have just a couple more weeks and we'll be into the hot months. So, we really need to fill up our lakes and our streams. And Colorado needs rain desperately. And so, we're going to call it in. We're going to believe God. And that's what we always do. We're going to believe God and we're going to get some rain. You know, I just thought about all the things that the Lord has done this week and just being thankful for every single thing that he has done, giving him holy praise. Like Paul and Silas in the midnight hour giving him praise in the prison and the walls began to shake. They weren't praying, they were praising. And in the praise, God delivered them out of the prison. And I think tonight's a good night for whatever you've been through this week. The walls will begin to shake in your life. The walls that have held you back, that have held you captive. I feel it in my heart tonight that the Lord is saying, if you just give me some praise where you are, in your circumstance, the walls that have been holding you captive will begin to shake in your life. And I know that this is true. I felt it in my spirit as I was praying this afternoon. And he said, I've done some good things, Brandon, and a lot of people, I've healed their bodies. I've delivered them from some things. And I need some gratitude. Some gratitude. Let's just praise him for just a couple minutes for everything he's done in your life. You may say, Well, Brandon, I just have just a little bit of a breakthrough. Praise him for the breakthrough that you have. Praise him for where you are, that you're not where you used to be. And I believe in doing so the manifestation of what you're believing for. There's an expiration date on it. And I'm telling you, I believe with all my heart that God is a God that will deliver his people. And there's expiration dates to what you've been believing for. All things are possible to him who believes. So, Father, we just give you praise and glory and honor for this prayer time tonight. We praise you, Father, for the breakthrough, for whatever they're believing for. Father, in their health, in their minds and their emotions and their marriages, Father, we thank you, Lord, for the week that we had, and I thank you for the week that we're about to start. We're so grateful, Father, that you have showed up and showed off in our lives over the month of April. There were so many breakthroughs and so many things that we saw in prayer. And Lord, we thank you for the month of May. We start out this month of May, Father, with great expectation for great turnaround in our circumstances. No matter what it is that we're believing for, Father, we're believing for exceedingly abundantly above all that we dare ask or think. So, Father, we dedicate this month to you. We dedicate the month of May that this will be the beginning of supernatural blessing and increase, healing, marriages restored, children coming home, whatever they may need. Father, I thank you, Lord, that we praise you in that midnight hour. And I believe the walls of our circumstances are shaking right now. They're shaking. And I thank you, Lord, that Father, the chains have been broken. You were crucified for us and Father you were resurrected on the third day and you dwell in us in the name of Jesus richly by faith and we believe that Father the breakthrough of what we're believing for is right at hand. Jobs and better jobs, raises and bonuses, benefits, sales and commissions, growth in businesses and states and inheritances, rebates and returns, checks in the mail, gifts and surprises. Do you believe that? Finding money, bills paid off, blessing and increase, healing in your body, from the top of your head to the soles of your feet. I believe that God is a rewarder of those that diligently seek him. And Father, we thank you, Lord, that you're the healer and you're the deliverer. And Father, we thank you for the good things that we're about to see in the rest of this year, 2026. We are ahead of schedule. 2026. Wow. Where have I been? Interesting. When I was seeing it over in the spirit realm. There was things I was seeing over just not even an hour ago. And it was concerning the years and what the Lord is showing me. 2026, 2027. Where are we at in 2027? What does 2027 look like? But what does the rest of 2026 look like? And as I was looking over into it, as I was praying, he said, I have some things I need to show you before you start your live stream. And the shaking of our nation, the shaking of the nations. We've never been in a time like we're about to see. When the Lord said in 2025, that's what he said on September the 23rd, you would enter into the point of no return, the point of acceleration whenever they had the UN meeting and it was all about Israel and the things that were taking place and then we entered into this year. But I'm trying to warn you. We're about to enter in a time like we've never seen before. Even more with all the wars and the rumors of wars, an acceleration above everything we've ever seen before. And I'm telling you by the spirit of God, we're about to see signs and wonders in these last days like we've never seen before. Oh, I don't believe that. Well, that's okay. You don't have to experience it. I believe with all my heart that we're about to see God show up and show off in our lives and demonstrations and manifestations of the glory. And I have expectation for what God is about to do in the latter part of this year going into 2027. As I was looking to the east, you know, whenever you see things and he talks about martyrs and he was talking to me about martyrs in the body of Christ and he was saying that there's a lot of people he said there'll be a lot of martyrs in the days ahead. I said I don't really like that. He said, Well, Brandon, there will be a lot of martyrs in the days ahead. I saw certain people that I'm familiar with on stages preaching and they just went home. I watched them as they were preaching the gospel and they were taken out by sniper. Couldn't figure out why the covering wasn't there. I was praying over these things. I said, So, are you asking me to change this? What are you at? What is this? Why are you showing me this? And he said, Some people will come home. He talked about sovereignty today. He talked a lot about things that are very hard for me to talk about. And he said, My sovereign hand will move the people. I saw the people moving. I saw great migration again. I saw this nation shaking. I saw things that were frightening to me a little bit in the natural. And as I got fearful, he yelled three times, Fear not, Brandon. Fear not. Fear not for what you're looking at, for what's coming. Keep your eyes on me. I will hide you in the cliff of the rock. 1 Corinthians 5:5 will start to come to full manifestation, a shaking and an awakening of the bride to bring her to my side. For there is a slumber upon the nations. There is, they're asleep and there will be an awakening unto God. Awakening unto God for what is about to take place. And it will be around the world for the bride is asleep. A lot of them. And this is one last call, for the sun is setting on this dispensation of grace. The sun is setting. And as I saw a building exploding—it looked like some kind of device, a nuclear device or something in a building up northeast—it was a major building. And I saw it; I saw this device going off up northeast. It looked like nuclear. Something happens. I saw something very, very tragic taking place. And then I saw the headlines in the papers, and I saw, 'Terror strikes again. Terror strikes again.' And then I saw in the headlines, 'Terror in the heartland.' A nation in turmoil. I saw this in the headlines in black bold letters: 'Nation in Turmoil.' I wasn't going to jump right into this, but I don't want to waste your time. I have such an urgency in my heart to tell you: you must wake up. I see the headlines in the papers. I see what the Lord is showing me concerning this nation and other nations—a shaking to awaken. As I told you, Cuba is next. The Lord said Cuba is next. He's going to liberate the people. A major revival is coming to Cuba. A major outpouring of the Spirit of God is coming to Cuba. And God is going to use Marco Rubio in the days ahead to bring—it was personal to him. And I saw him in the hand of the Lord being led; and David slew his tens of thousands and Saul slew his thousands. There are things that you will see Marco Rubio do in the days ahead. And a shaking to Cuba and to the Latino community—it's going to be epic—a huge move of God in the Latino community and in the Asian community. I'm not just singling them out, but this is what I have been praying over this weekend. And I want to show you what President Trump just said that goes with everything that we've been praying, to show you we're on target with our prayers. And President Trump came out publicly and he said this: 'An architect who's really talented—he's done a lot of work for him—he's got a flair, a beautiful Hispanic flair in particular. And he comes from originally a place called Cuba, which we will be taking over almost immediately.' No, Cuba's got problems. We'll finish one first; I like to finish a job. On the way back from what we'll do on the way back from Iran, we'll have one of our big, maybe the USS Abraham Lincoln aircraft carrier, the biggest in the world—we'll have that come in, stop about a hundred yards offshore, and they'll say, "Thank you very much. We give up." Good job. It's coming. The Lord said it's coming and the shaking of Cuba is coming. I truly believe this with all my heart. The Lord said, 'I'm going to bring great revival to Cuba.' And he's joking about it, but I believe he's really serious in his heart. Then the Lord showed us a major thing about to take place with Ukraine. And I saw Zelensky. He was doing cocaine and he had prostitutes around him. He had all kinds of things going on in this room. And he was no longer here. In the days ahead, I saw him trying to either... and it was two paths. I saw him getting on a plane with lots of $100 bills and he was going to another nation. And then I've seen him being taken out in this building, and I saw a new government coming in in the days ahead that will be brought in by a proxy government, pro-Ukraine, pro-Russia. But I saw Macron in the last vision and the last time I was with you all two days ago, I saw a cardinal striking a dove and the dove was dead upon the ground and his heart was ripped out, and I saw two black crows looking at the dead dove's body. I saw a turtle; I saw it had glasses on. I could see the cardinal and the turtle were friends. I could see across a weasel. A weasel was in France. I saw a weasel scheming. I could see a cobra coming up out of the Middle East. But as I looked at the lifeless bird laying on the ground, the bear was poked with missiles coming out of France, giving them to Ukraine, trying to stir up World War III. And as I was looking into that this last week, I saw a plan because I saw Trump trying to pull out of NATO and he said in articles that we're pulling out 5,000 troops out of Germany. Do you see it? I've seen that. It was important because that's what we saw Thursday. And the Lord warned us that they would try to devise a plan to ensnare the United States in the days ahead to stay in NATO as Trump tries to pull out and says, 'Listen, we're not going to be a part of this anymore because you're not backing us.' And he was asking for help in the Strait. And I saw under-the-table deals. Europe rattled by... Do you see it? And that's why I saw they would try to provoke it and it manifested. This is what we saw on Thursday. And this happened over the next day or so. So, I saw a rattling—like what they're saying—but I saw President Trump saying we're going to do this. And I saw under-the-table agreements with the king, and he is a scorpion. But I saw the chameleon would try to do a coup against President Trump, a coup to overthrow him with the 25th Amendment. I saw a coup and the Lord said, 'Don't forget January 6th.' And there were a lot of innocent people that were accused of things and were in there like the pastor out in Amarillo, Brian. There are a lot of good people that were accused of things, but you had a bunch of bad apples, deep state in the midst of the January 6th thing that were there to create violence and stir up trouble. And the good people were mixed with the bad people. And the Lord said, 'Don't forget January 6th. Another event is coming.' There's something else coming to the nation. Now, when I'm looking into these visions and the Lord has me praying over them, they're all very similar, yet very different, you know, like the way the picture is and what he's showing me of how to pray for our nation to pray for revival—a shaking in our nation with the buildings burning in New York. I see these buildings. I see explosions in the buildings. I see fire. And the Lord said, 'Don't forget the prophetic words that I gave to David Wilkerson.' Remember I told you I saw a black, white, and red boat that was an oil tanker that would be hijacked? And I said they put a device in the oil and they will hijack the boat. And I saw everybody on the crew was murdered and they take the boat and they put a device in it. Does anybody remember that? Put in the comment section if you remember a hijacking of a boat when I told you I see a boat that will come out and it will be black, red and white and it will be hijacked and they will put a device in the boat. Does anybody remember it? Well, it happened. I don't know where the boat is, but this is interesting to me. Is it the boat that I saw? I don't know. All I know is I saw a boat that was red, black, and white, and it was an oil boat, and they put the oil in the middle, and they used a dirty thing in this, and it was a massive device that was dirty, and they would hijack it. And I saw all the crew deceased in the boat. I think it was kind of interesting. Same colors, everything. But he warned me this was a very dangerous thing. Poland. NATO moved a thousand troops with heavy gear to the Russian doorstep in Poland. Now, what did I show you? What did I tell you about Poland? Warsaw. I said they will provoke Putin in the days ahead and he will use a weapon that has never been used ever before on the face of the earth. And it will not disintegrate the buildings or the cars, but it melts the people. I've never seen something like that before. But he didn't destroy the land. And the Lord said it is not nuclear. It is a weapon that has never been used. It looked like a nuclear weapon, but it wasn't. And the Lord said, "This is by Warsaw, Poland." And He said, "They will provoke them in the days ahead." Is this what we're about to see? I'm telling you, an acceleration of World War III trying to bring forth the Mahdi. Here it is. Do you see that? I warned you all. We've been praying what the Lord showed us, and I saw they would try to keep President Trump from leaving NATO. They'll try to snare him. And I saw Emmanuel Macron riding a black swan down the river. A massive black swan. And he was riding it down the river in France. Do you see that? Do they see it? So, these are the things the Lord has showed us before, and now we see it in the news. And I saw a major draft coming out of this. This is what I saw the draft considering. Remember I said why? Because Apollyon came up out of the pit and started going like a top, and it looked like a Tasmanian devil. Can you show them that? The Tasmanian devil. Okay. I know I'm throwing new things at you, but it's what I'm getting by the spirit of God while I'm talking. Keep going. What? It's one of those, baby. I remember. You've done a lot of work, son. So we saw a major draft, and that's whenever I saw there was not enough people to fight, and they called for this whenever the major war broke out in Europe. Then North Korea joined it. And as I was watching this last vision when we were praying together, I saw China turn its back on Russia and was looking with something in his hand, and he had a smirk on his face as he was looking towards Taiwan, and lights and things were coming out of Taiwan. And the Lord said, "Remember this." So, there's things that we're seeing in the news now that are alarming because we're in it. Now, go ahead and play this one. This is interesting because this is what I saw in 2023. Talk about it again. I saw a demon that was chained in a pit with these massive chains on top of this devil binding him in this pit. And I saw an angelic being from the Lord come down and release that demonic spirit, and it came up out of that pit and he started spinning like the Tasmanian devil on Bugs Bunny. He was spinning profusely when he got out of that pit, and he went inside Vladimir Putin's area. It was like I saw Vladimir Putin—I'm going to say it's like he went inside Vladimir Putin—and all of a sudden I saw him strike Poland because Poland got missiles from other countries. Something happened. Poland was provoking Russia because of war stuff and helping out with Ukraine. But there was something more to this. So all of a sudden about Warsaw, Poland, I believe is where by the Belarus area, I saw a humongous mushroom cloud kind of an explosion. I said, "Lord, oh no, they're going to use tactical nukes." And the Lord said, "No, this is a weapon that has never been used before, ever, on the earth." We've never seen this. I saw a demon. That's it. You did good. I like it. That's when you first started. But we saw that in prayer, and I saw Warsaw and I saw a provoking of our military to get in this, and that was how many years ago. And now we're seeing things on the border. We're seeing President Trump saying, "I'm leaving. We're taking our troops out of Germany." And I said, "In this, they will provoke a major war to keep the United States in it because they cannot afford to lose us." And so back then, Biden was in power, and I thought, is Creepy Joe going to do something stupid? I didn't see Trump because it was Biden. Well, three years later, we have President Trump back and he's saying, "I'm pulling the troops out of NATO. You didn't help me out. I'm going to get my troops out of here." And this is exactly what we saw was a pulling of the troops, a provoking—something's coming. And then I saw missiles that look like Tomahawk missiles being given to Ukraine to go deep into Russia from France. As I saw the dove on the ground and I saw the heart ripped out, the Lord said, "Don't tell who they are. It's not necessary." He says, "It's symbolic by animals for a reason." That's why he gave you doves, cardinals, turtles, because it was code. And the Lord said, "I did that on purpose today." I just follow him. He said, "I gave it to you in code on purpose." So I gave it to you how he gave it to me. I know who the things are and what they represent. You will too if you pray in the spirit. Next. He has the cards. He put this on his Truth Social. So he's making a joke. And so he's playing with the cards again. I said instead he had the full house in his last hand, now he has all the wilds and he's going to win. But the Lord said, "Be humble." Remember, and the Lord said in this, "Do not underestimate your enemy, for they have things that you don't know they have." And maybe you do know they have them now, sir. But I saw Cuba and I saw sniffers. Sniffers going all over Cuba trying to sniff it. But it was encased in lead. What we were looking for was encased in lead. I don't understand what I'm seeing, but I'm just trying to tell you what we are looking for is encased in lead. I don't know what that does. All I know is the Lord said, "This is encased in lead, what we're looking for." And they can't smell it. Go ahead. Next. I want you to see this about the shrimp. All these are dead. Do you see all those? They're all dead. What's killing all the shrimp? Literally millions of them. Where is this at? Oman Beach transforms into a red carpet of death. Oman. So, it's over there by Iran. What is killing all the shrimp? I wonder if they're edible. I'm teasing. You couldn't pay me to eat that. It's a lot of low-calorie meal there. It's disgusting. Ready? Go ahead. Okay, and then I mean that's it. We have the boat. Then we have a new mysterious plague on a boat. Three dead and suspected some kind of outbreak. It's a Hantavirus. A British outbreak aboard an Atlantic Ocean ship. So, there's a new kind of virus. Is this the virus the Lord showed us? I do not believe so. The virus the Lord showed us would start in Europe with rats. They said mouse transmitted, but it's not it. It would be the black plague. This would be like similar to the black plague. I saw sores all over the people's bodies, and it was nasty, and it kills over 350 million people when it happens. And the Lord said it will be a virus that is on steroids compared to COVID when it manifests. It's part of the end times. I said, "Can we stop it?" He said, "No, but you can lessen it." So, I'm not trying to give you all bad news. I'm trying to tell you the signs of the times are happening all around us. You said, "Well, Brandon, you're just full of great news today. I come on your channel to get lifted up, and here you are bringing me down." I'm not trying to bring you down. I'm trying to bring you into reality, letting you see where we are now. That's why we praised him at the beginning because you need to know there's a God of the breakthrough working on your behalf. But right now, we are in serious times. And it is not time for the church to have its head in the sand. It's time for the church to have a backbone like a crowbar and learn who they are and walk in authority because you're not hearing this on mainstream media. Fake news isn't telling you what's truly going on in the world. Look, a cruise ship in the Atlantic Ocean kills three people. It is with mice. And I said it will be with rats and they will release it out of a lab. And it's China. The Lord said China will do this. So, let's go to what we saw today. I saw cyber attacks coming against our nation in a great form against our electric grid, against our infrastructure, our water, our facilities, our electric, our natural gas, our major infrastructures. The Lord said specifically, you need to pray over your electric grid. I saw some cities without electricity for over three weeks coming. Now look at what's next. We've got to move quickly. You've already had 30 minutes. That's it. See this right here? I told you. I saw the 1970s oil crisis. I saw this when I saw the things happening with the strait and with President Trump and what was going to take place with Israel, and a lot of it will be blamed on Israel. But I saw gas lines like the 1970s. Now they are comparing this right now to some of it. Now, we got that little thing off of Johnny Bravo's—he's a YouTuber. Now, do you see all this? That's exactly what the Lord said for us to pray about. I saw gas lines for over a mile long. They were stretched down the block and there was not enough gas for people in some places. Now, from what I understand, Cuba is paying $47 a gallon for gas right now. There are 10 million people there. $47 a gallon. You aren't going very many places if it's $47 a gallon. That's a lot of money, especially when they don't make anything. So, you're walking. It's pretty sad for some of those folks. That's sad. $47 a gallon is a lot of money. Two gallons of gas is almost 100 bucks. Go ahead. Next. Do you see it? And I thought this is—and this is not financial advice, okay? It's just me having fun. All in my opinion, this next little clip that I'm going to show you is just me having fun. So, if I show this to you, it's not me telling you anything. It's just me being—it's just fun for me. See, I thought this was neat seeing Cheshire Cat. I say Garlinghouse will smile like a Cheshire Cat in the month of May. Look at that. Isn't that neat? He's smiling like a Cheshire Cat. It's neat how the Lord talks in code like that to Brandon Biggs and he'll show me things like a smile. He's smiling like a Cheshire Cat. Garlinghouse is happy. Why? I don't know. Maybe because his stuff's in his sign and behind him. He's just advertising, I guess. But there you go. It's funny. They didn't fold. You know when to hold them, know when to fold them. Just like the Lord said. Know when to walk away. Know when to run. You better count your money when you're sitting at the table. Ready? Yep. It's good. All right. We love y'all. I'm so glad that's the first half. We tried. We went fast. Braden, you did good. You work hard. That's what's going on in the news. So, everything we bring to you is what we have seen in visions. Even with "they didn't fold." Remember when I told you, I see it in the spirit. Know when to hold them. Know when to fold them. I said this. I told you those exact words. It's in the sign. Do you see it? I hear these things and then I see it in a vision and then it's there for you to see it. I sang the song for you last time. All right. All in my opinion. I'm not entitled to my opinion what the Lord tells me. First Amendment gives me that right. Thank God for it right now. Right. Next. Anything else? I mean, he's done with Byron Donalds. Okay. And the African-American man. Okay. This is who I believe the Lord—and now people got so upset. I live in Florida. We don't want him. We want this guy. You don't know what you're asking for. And I've tried to walk very carefully on this, but I've seen this man right here. Something about this man now, whatever. But it's neat that he's there and I believe he will be your next governor. And I believe Ron DeSantis will be part of the Trump cabinet and he will take Rubio's place in the days ahead. I think Rubio will be something else. All right, you ready? Let's pray. Yeah, go ahead. You can play it. Byron Donalds. Special guy. Thank you. He's so far ahead in the polls, I don't have to ask him to come up. I would ask him, but my theory is when you're up by more than 20 points, it's a waste of time. And so you say, "Well, you miss it if he doesn't." Okay. Well, you know what? I can miss it. But I keep seeing it in my spirit to pray for this man, Mike Lindell and him. But Mike Lindell, I don't feel strong about. I feel stronger for this guy. Mike Lindell, he has a fight. The Lord said, "Pray for Mike Lindell. Pray for his health specifically. Pray for him because God wants Mike Lindell to win Minnesota, but it's going to take a fight." And I saw corruption in voter fraud in the days ahead concerning who they want as the weaker contestant against the Democrat. They don't want the stronger contestant that will win against the Democrat. I saw them fighting this in Atlanta and I saw voter fraud. The Lord said, "Pray for this." So we will continue to stand for this beautiful nation that God has given us. We will pray for our president. We will pray for his safety, his protection, his health, his veins, his blood flow, his heart, everything that we can do to cover him in the mighty name of Jesus and that he gets across the finish line. I believe it is our job as the body of Christ to lift up this man. He has all hell coming against him in the spirit realm. And I can feel it every single time I'm praying. I say, "You can feel that heaviness." And I told you, I said, "There's a black dot over his shoulder." It was on his right side. It was the king. It was all last week. The Lord said, "Pray for this. There's things that you do not know that are being said. Pray for his protection. Pray for his discernment on who he is doing business with. For he is dealing business with a scorpion." A lot of times I don't know what these symbols mean, but a scorpion will sting you. As he held a bee in his hand, did it have anything to do with it? I don't know. I don't try to say there's a devil behind every bush. No, don't be flaky. But I'm going to tell you there are things that are symbolic. The Lord is warning us to intercede.
